youtube_metadata.description: Daily Stoic wisdom and philosophy to build mental strength and resilience. #shorts #stoic

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: greek philosopher statue head close up
fallback_facts.text_block: Control your thoughts, <yellow>or they will control you.</yellow> Focus only on what is in your power, and <red>let go of the rest.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Master Your Thoughts

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: ocean waves crashing on rocks sunset storm
fallback_facts.text_block: The obstacle is the way. Every challenge is an opportunity to <yellow>practice self-control</yellow> and build <red>mental toughness.</red>
fallback_facts.title: The Obstacle Is The Way

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: starry night sky cosmos telescope zoom
fallback_facts.text_block: You have power over your mind, <yellow>not outside events.</yellow> Realize this, and you will find <red>immense strength.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Power Over Your Mind
